description: Draft → Submitted → Approved workflow exported as OCEL 2.0 JSON. Asserts the four top-level arrays required by §6.4 (objectTypes, eventTypes, objects, events), that events.len() equals the provenance record count, that every event carries a relationship to the sole wf-instance object, and that empty timestamps round-trip as "" rather than being omitted (OCEL requires time on every event; the exporter deliberately surfaces missed-stamp sites with an empty string). Kernel and event sequence are defined once in tests/export_conformance.rs (shared_workflow_kernel / shared_workflow_events).
